name: HENNESSY ADVISORS INC
business: Hennessy Advisors, Inc. provides investment advisory services to a family of 16 open-end mutual funds and one exchange traded fund (ETF) branded as the Hennessy Funds. The company earns revenues primarily from investment advisory fees and secondarily from shareholder service fees, both calculated as a percentage of the average daily net asset values of the funds.
sellsTo: investors in mutual funds and ETF
namedSuppliers: The London Company of Virginia, LLC

exposures.sentence: The Hennessy Sustainable ETF seeks long term capital appreciation by combining sustainability metrics and machine learning/artificial intelligence (ML/AI) in a tax-efficient ETF structure.
